name: IGH_GooProxy
summary: Base interface for all type proxies.

methods.name: Construct
methods.summary: This method will be called when a new instance of this type is constructed. It allows implementers to supply a customized UI to be shown during construction. This method should never throw exceptions.

methods.name: FormatInstance
methods.summary: Returns a String description of the current value.
methods.remarks: If the implementation IsParsable(), then this representation will be in parsable format.

methods.name: FromString
methods.summary: If IsParsable(), then attempts to convert the string to a generic type value

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure. This method should not throw exceptions.

methods.name: MutateString
methods.summary: Munge a string to remove obvious errors on account of the user.

properties.name: IsParsable
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the type can be instantiated from a String.

properties.name: ProxyOwner
properties.summary: Gets the piece of Grasshopper data that spawned this proxy.

properties.name: UserString
properties.summary: Gets or sets the user-defined string that describes this proxy. This only really makes sense if the Proxy is Parsable.

properties.name: Valid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this proxy represents valid data.
